ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species (e.g., Animal, Plant) */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "ecological_characteristics" TEXT /* Ecological characteristics of the site (e.g., Semi-Arid) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophic_categories" (
  "trophic_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophic category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trophic category (e.g., I-Predator, I-Gatherer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trophic category */,
  "energy_flow" TEXT /* Energy flow of the trophic category (e.g., Herbivore, Carnivore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trophic_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the guild (e.g., Invertebrate, Fish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guild */,
  "roles" TEXT /* Roles of the guild (e.g., Predator, Prey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_data" (
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "trophic_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trophic category */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild */,
  "size_max" REAL /* Maximum size of the species */,
  "carbon" REAL /* Carbon composition of the species */,
  "hydrogen" REAL /* Hydrogen composition of the species */,
  "nitrogen" REAL /* Nitrogen composition of the species */,
  "oxygen" REAL /* Oxygen composition of the species */,
  "hydrogen_water" REAL /* Hydrogen-water composition of the species */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Sampling method used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecological_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_guild_id FOREIGN KEY ("guild_id") REFERENCES guilds ("guild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_trophic_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("trophic_category_id") REFERENCES trophic_categories ("trophic_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elemental_composition" (
  "elemental_composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elemental composition entry */,
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological data entry */,
  "carbon" REAL /* Carbon composition of the species */,
  "hydrogen" REAL /* Hydrogen composition of the species */,
  "nitrogen" REAL /* Nitrogen composition of the species */,
  "oxygen" REAL /* Oxygen composition of the species */,
  "phosphorus" REAL /* Phosphorus composition of the species */,
  "calcium" REAL /* Calcium composition of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elemental_composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elemental_composition_ecological_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecological_data_id") REFERENCES ecological_data ("ecological_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isotopic_data" (
  "isotopic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotopic data entry */,
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological data entry */,
  "src_d15N_AQ_mu" REAL /* Src d15N AQ mu value */,
  "src_d15N_TE_mu" REAL /* Src d15N TE mu value */,
  "percent_AQ_mu" REAL /* Percent AQ mu value */,
  "percent_TE_mu" REAL /* Percent TE mu value */,
  "src_d13C_AQ_mu" REAL /* Src d13C AQ mu value */,
  "src_d13C_TE_mu" REAL /* Src d13C TE mu value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotopic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isotopic_data_ecological_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecological_data_id") REFERENCES ecological_data ("ecological_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ecological_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecological_data_id") REFERENCES ecological_data ("ecological_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophic_levels" (
  "trophic_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophic level entry */,
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological data entry */,
  "trophic_level_fbase" REAL /* Trophic level fbase value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trophic_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophic_levels_ecological_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecological_data_id") REFERENCES ecological_data ("ecological_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "data_quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "ecological_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological data entry */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_ecological_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecological_data_id") REFERENCES ecological_data ("ecological_data_id")
)
